svg.text: ARTIST 1 / CAST 3 / THE GROUND DECIDES THE BODY
A. ALL NINE IN PURE SILHOUETTE (the gate). Rows: f1 at 18, f1 at 32, f2 at 18, f2 at 32.
B. SIZE LADDER, frame 1 then frame 2, on bgDeep / terrainPlain / bgPanel.
C. 4x INSPECTION (editing only, proves nothing). Frame 1 top, frame 2 bottom.
D. 4 PLAYER COLORS x 3 BACKGROUNDS at 32 px. Rows bgDeep / terrainPlain / bgPanel.
E. 18 px DOCK BADGE (face crop). Top row 18 px as shipped, bottom row 64 px to inspect. Mule has none.
F. THE FOUR TIGHT PAIRS, pure silhouette, 18 then 32 then 64. Judge these first.
G. 64 px, all four player colors, on terrain (the hard background).
